title: Real-Time Analytics Dashboard with Query Playground and AI-Driven Data Filtering

statement.markdown:
## Projects Challenge: Real-Time Analytics Dashboard with Query Playground and AI-Driven Data Filtering

Your objective is to build a fully functional, highly interactive React component representing the target design mockup.

### 🎨 Color Palette
* `#B7D7CD`
* `#C06C88`
* `#411C56`

### 📐 Target Design Mockup
Use the visual mockup shown in the panel to guide your coordinate alignment, container proportions, and spacing.

### 📌 Target Design SVG Source
The target geometry is defined by the following SVG vector graphic (viewable by the LLM judge):
```xml
<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' width='400' height='300'>
  <rect x='10' y='10' width='380' height='280' fill='#090a0f' rx='10'/>
  <g transform='translate(20, 20)' fill='#C06C88'>
    <text x='0' y='10' font-size='24'>Analytics Dashboard</text>
    <rect x='0' y='40' width='150' height='30' fill='#B7D7CD' rx='10'/>
  </g>
  <g transform='translate(30, 80)' fill='#411C56'>
    <rect x='0' y='0' width='200' height='30' fill='#B7D7CD' rx='10'/>
    <text x='10' y='10' font-size='18'>Query Playground</text>
    <text x='10' y='30' font-size='18'>Data Filtering</text>
  </g>
  <g transform='translate(30, 180)' fill='#411C56'>
    <rect x='0' y='0' width='180' height='30' fill='#B7D7CD' rx='10'/>
    <text x='10' y='10' font-size='18'>Sorting</text>
    <text x='10' y='30' font-size='18'>Multi-Chart Visualizations</text>
  </g>
  <g transform='translate(240, 180)' fill='#411C56'>
    <rect x='0' y='0' width='180' height='30' fill='#B7D7CD' rx='10'/>
    <text x='10' y='10' font-size='18'>Real-Time Data Updates</text>
    <text x='10' y='30' font-size='18'>Dynamic Filtering</text>
  </g>
</svg>
```

### ⚙️ Requirements
1. Match the visual presentation (layout, alignment, borders, colors) of the mockup.
2. Implement all necessary React state variables, event handlers, and input bindings to make the page interactive.
3. Make sure all interactive controls (buttons, forms, checkboxes, sliders) update the view correctly.

constraints: Must use the provided color palette
Must include a query playground with real-time data updates
Must include AI-driven data filtering with dynamic filtering and sorting
Must include multi-chart visualizations with real-time data

referenceAssets.caption: Recreate target design: Real-Time Analytics Dashboard with Query Playground and AI-Driven Data Filtering

gradingCriteria.description: Evaluate how closely the layout, colors, and positioning match the target visual mockup.
Verify interactive state updates, query playground functionality, AI-driven data filtering, and multi-chart visualizations.
Review code cleanliness, proper semantic elements, and efficient state use.
